{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui

|pkmn=Rowlet
|type1=Grass
|type2=Flying
|gender=male
|img=Professor Kukui Rowlet Adventures.png

|desc={{p|Rowlet}} originally belonged to Professor Kukui. He was first seen being used to test out moves alongside {{p|Popplio}}. He was given to {{adv|Moon}} after seeing how he bonded with her.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Popplio
|type1=Water
|img=Professor Kukui Popplio Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM02
|epname=The Delivery of Rotom and the Girl
|desc={{p|Popplio}} is Professor Kukui's first known Pokémon. It was first seen being used to test out moves alongside {{p|Rowlet}}. He later gave it away to [[Hau]].}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Rotom
|main=Rotom Pokédex (Adventures)
|type1=Electric
|type2=Ghost
|img=Kukui Rotom Adventures.png
|epnum=PASM01
|epname=The Grand Entrance and Delivery Boy Sun
|desc=Kukui requested that this {{p|Rotom}} be delivered to him in order to combine with {{adv|Sun}}'s Pokédex. Due to its weakness, Rotom was unable to be delivered electronically, so it had to be hand-delivered by {{adv|Moon}}, whose pharmaceutical skills kept it healthy along the way. Once Rotom was delivered, Kukui attempted to try and get it to possess Sun's Pokédex, but Sun's mishandling of the Pokédex left it dirty, causing Rotom to run away in disgust. Later, it combined with Moon's Pokédex to become the [[Rotom Pokédex]].}}
